name: Classic Ocean Sunglasses
description: Premium polarization shielding with a classic ocean blue metal frame. Hand-polished temples and UV400 sun protection lenses provide visual clarity and eye health under hot summer rays.

name: Organic Aloe SPF50 Sunscreen
description: Ultra-light hydration formula containing natural organic aloe extracts. Absorbs quickly without greasy white residues. Provides SPF 50 broad spectrum defense against UVA and UVB rays.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Light, breathable floral maxi dress woven with high-quality linen. Offers cool comfort for seaside beach walks and casual summer evening socials.

name: Wide-Brim Straw Hat
description: Elegant hand-woven straw hat featuring a broad brim to shade your face and neck. Fitted with an adjustable internal sweatband and ribbon accent.

name: Insulated Summer Water Bottle
description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel flask. Keeps water ice-cold for up to 24 hours. Features a leak-proof straw lid and a durable sweat-free coat.

name: Sandproof Beach Towel
description: Compact microfiber towel engineered to repel sand instantly. Dries three times faster than regular cotton and folds down into a small mesh storage pouch.
